content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a technical datasheet for a "Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030". It contains: - Title and product name. - A graph showing "Typical L vs Frequency". - A diagram showing the physical layout and dimensions of the component. - A table listing "Recommended Land Pattern" with dimensions for various part numbers. - Contact information for Coilcraft in different regions (US, UK, Taiwan, China, Singapore). - A footer with the Coilcraft logo and document details. **2. Break down the content into logical sections:** * **Header:** "HIGH TEMPERATURE", "Document 863-2" * **Title:** "Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030" * **Sub-title:** "Typical L vs Frequency" * **Logos/Icons:** RoHS/REACH Compliant, Halogen Free, AEC Q200 +125°C * **Graph:** * Y-axis: Inductance (µH) * X-axis: Frequency (MHz) * Curves representing different inductance values (0.16 µH to 10 µH) * **Diagram:** * Top view of the inductor with dimensions. * Side view with dimensions. * Notes about terminal direction and EMI. * **Table:** * Columns: Dash number, Terminal width (in / mm), Land pattern width (in / mm) * Rows: Various part numbers (-161, -301, etc.) and their corresponding dimensions. * Note: "Dimensions are in inches mm" * **Footer:** * Coilcraft logo * Contact info for US, UK, Taiwan, China, Singapore * Document number and revision date. **3. Construct the JSON:** * Start with the main title and product info. * Include the graph data as a description since I can't extract exact values easily. * Describe the diagram and its annotations. * Transcribe the table data. * Include the footer information. **Drafting the JSON:** ```json [{"bbox": [93, 11, 365, 70], "category": "header", "text": "HIGH TEMPERATURE"}, {"bbox": [776, 9, 915, 26], "category": "header", "text": "Document 863-2"}, {"bbox": [19, 78, 68, 135], "category": "icon", "text": "RoHS/REACH COMPLIANT"}, {"bbox": [84, 82, 587, 114], "category": "title", "text": "Shielded Power Inductors – XAL7030"}, {"bbox": [85, 122, 315, 147], "category": "title", "text": "Typical L vs Frequency"}, {"bbox": [19, 142, 68, 201], "category": "icon", "text": "Halogen Free"}, {"bbox": [19, 208, 68, 266], "category": "icon", "text": "AEC Q200 +125°C"}, {"bbox": [85, 150, 486, 389], "category": "graph", "text": "Graph showing Inductance (µH) vs Frequency (MHz). Y-axis ranges from 0.1 to 100 µH. X-axis ranges from 0.1 to 100 MHz. Curves represent inductance values from 0.16 µH to 10 µH."}, {"bbox": [514, 122, 796, 269], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram of the inductor showing top and side views with dimensions. Top view shows a rectangular component with terminals. Side view shows height and terminal length. Annotations indicate terminal direction and EMI considerations."}, {"bbox": [514, 270, 693, 363], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing side view dimensions. Height is 0.123 ±0.010 (3.12 ±0.25)."}, {"bbox": [724, 268, 912, 342], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing top view dimensions. Width is 0.122 max (3.1). Length is 0.236 typ (6.0)."}, {"bbox": [514, 367, 678, 500], "category": "figure", "text": "Diagram showing side view dimensions. Height is 0.116 (2.94). Width is 0.256 (6.50)."}, {"bbox": [521, 504, 635, 534], "category": "title", "text": "Recommended Land Pattern"}, {"bbox": [791, 515, 912, 534], "category": "text", "text": "Dimensions are in inches mm"}, {"bbox": [520, 544, 746, 710], "category": "table", "text": "
Dash numberTerminal width ±0.004 / ±0,10 (in / mm)Land pattern width (in / mm)
-1610.063 / 1,600.070 / 1.78
-3010.063 / 1,600.070 / 1.78

"}, {"bbox": [86, 919, 279, 963], "category": "footer", "text": "Coilcraft"}, {"bbox": [149, 965, 275, 978], "category": "footer", "text": "www.coilcraft.com"}, {"bbox": [329, 917, 642, 979], "category": "footer", "text": "US +1-847-639-6400 sales@coilcraft.com\nUK +44-1236-730595 sales@coilcraft-europe.com\nTaiwan +886-2-2264 3646 sales@coilcraft.com.tw\nChina +86-21-6218 8074 sales@coilcraft.com.cn\nSingapore + 65-6484 8412 sales@coilcraft.com.sg"}, {"bbox": [697, 917, 913, 931], "category": "footer", "text": "Document 863-2 Revised 12/16/25"}, {"bbox": [696, 932, 915, 978], "category": "footer", "text": "© Coilcraft Inc. 2025\nThis product may not be used in medical or high risk applications without prior Coilcraft approval.\nSpecification subject to change without notice.\nPlease check web site for latest information."}] ```
